name: blue-standup-bot
description: Microsoft Teams standup reminder bot with channel tab configuration

scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/src/db && cp src/db/schema.sql dist/src/db/schema.sql
scripts.prestart: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.package:teams: cd teams && zip -r ../blue-standup-bot.zip manifest.json color.png outline.png
scripts.validate:teams: npm run package:teams && npx --yes @microsoft/m365agentstoolkit-cli@latest validate --package-file ./blue-standup-bot.zip --interactive false
